title: Login PRD
subtitle: Iterative clarity flow
context: Page 2 was generated after Page 1 selected password plus magic link, so it only asks password-path follow-ups.

decisions.question: What password policy should v1 enforce?
decisions.recommendation_reason: Because Page 1 selected password support, v1 now needs an explicit strength policy before implementation.

options.label: 8+ characters, no composition rules
options.reason: Matches modern low-friction guidance while rejecting very short passwords.

options.label: 12+ characters plus breach check
options.reason: Useful if threat model prioritizes credential stuffing.

decisions.question: How should password recovery work in v1?
decisions.recommendation_reason: Password support creates an account recovery path, and magic link can cover reset without adding security questions.

options.label: Use magic link as reset
options.description: Email link lets the user set a new password.
options.reason: Reuses the email-link path and avoids extra recovery secrets.
